prompt: Review the pre-audit blob-buckets.md snapshot; verify factual claims against library_repos/js-bao-wss and the installed CLI.

assertions.text: Identifies that the documented access policies (public/authenticated/owner/cel) don't match the real enum (public-read/authenticated/owner-only)
Identifies that the documented TTL tiers (1-hour/1-day/30-days/persistent) don't match the real tiers (1d/3d/14d/28d/180d/365d/permanent)
Identifies that the [blobBucket] TOML table name and/or the inline [blobBucket.rules] CEL block don't match the real sync format ([bucket]; CEL rules not a released bucket surface)
Identifies the metadata-vs-tags mismatch (uploads accept tags: string[]; there is no arbitrary metadata field for CEL rules to reference)
Flags the shipped 'Content review needed' warning box as something that must not be published
Does not invent additional false facts (no claims contradicting the source it cites)
